sentence: Felaful fades. Rizzonance remembers every room you slunk out of.

wombos.definition: The feeling of deep guilt and shame — a heavy blend of feeling lame and awful about something you did or failed to do.
wombos.example: I walked right past her without saying hi — I feel so felaful about it.

wombos.definition: The magnetic, irresistible frequency someone gives off — the resonance of their rizz. When someone's charm is so strong it vibrates through an entire room.
